themes.title: User Tracking and Behavior Analysis
themes.description: Focus on tracking user behavior and preferences to enhance personalization.

themes.title: User Experience and Privacy Management
themes.description: Enhancing user experience through dashboards and privacy settings.

themes.title: Feedback and Compliance
themes.description: Ensuring compliance with regulations and collecting user feedback.

milestones.name: MVP Development
milestones.description: Develop core functionalities for user behavior tracking and compliance.
milestones.success_criteria: Complete user behavior tracking pipeline, ML recommendation engine, and GDPR compliance audit.

milestones.name: V1 Feature Implementation
milestones.description: Implement user preference dashboard and enhance tracking across devices.
milestones.success_criteria: Launch user preference dashboard, cross-device tracking, and data export features.

milestones.name: V2 Enhancements
milestones.description: Add monitoring for privacy metrics and user feedback collection.
milestones.success_criteria: Implement monitoring and alerting for privacy metrics and user feedback collection mechanism.

sequencing.reason: V1 features depend on the successful completion of MVP functionalities.
V2 enhancements require the foundational features established in V1.

mvp.goal: Establish core tracking and compliance functionalities.

v1.goal: Enhance user experience through additional features and privacy management.

v2.goal: Implement feedback mechanisms and privacy monitoring.
